selector-disallowed-list.message: custom CSS targeting a shadow-DOM component element — use the component's API instead (host inline styles, token overrides, shipped utility classes), or admit the missing capability properly (CLAUDE.md: APIs over custom code). Token-override classes like .wa-dark are the documented theming surface and pass.
